title: Compliance
doc_html:
§407.96.  Compliance

Nothing in this Part shall prevent any Head Start grantee or Early Head Start grantee from complying with all applicable federal laws, regulations, standards, and grant requirements.

Acts 2014, No. 717, §1, eff. June 18, 2014.
